user_prompt: Consecrate the promethium refinery before engagement
prayer:
Approach the promethium refinery with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the promethium refinery, beseeching its fiery essence for harmonious engagement.
Anoint the combustion chambers with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Ignition.
Sanctify the flow conduits, ensuring the promethium refinery awakens pure for engagement.
Verify the Machine Spirit's compliance through auspex rituals of flame and pressure.

user_prompt: My null field generator is ready for loading
prayer:
Kneel before the null field generator, intoning the Litany of Void-Birth.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the null field generator to accept the loading of its arcane matrices.
Initiate energy transfer whilst anointing null coils with consecrated oils of negation.
Cycle the field stabilizers, invoking Omnissiah's grace for flawless loading.
Confirm the null field generator's readiness via harmonic resonance scans.

In emergency haste, encircle the warp drive with electro-incense wards.
Command the warp drive's Machine Spirit to submit to shutdown, reciting the Rite of Abeyance.
Sever power feeds whilst beseeching the Omnissiah to quell its turbulent immaterium hungers.
Purge residual warp-taint from the warp drive through ablative chants and plasma lustrations.
Seal the warp drive in stasis, affirming the Machine Spirit's dormant vigil.

user_prompt: Prepare the actuality sphere for sterilization
prayer:
Present the actuality sphere upon the altar of purity, invoking the Omnissiah's sterilizing gaze.
Anoint its crystalline facets with rad-phage elixirs as preparation for sterilization.
Chant the Purge Canticle over the actuality sphere, awakening its Machine Spirit to self-cleansing.
Activate sterilization emitters whilst beseeching flawless excision of contaminants.
Verify the actuality sphere's immaculate state through noospheric diagnostic litanies.

Awaken the cognis heavy stubber's Machine Spirit for immediate engagement with ballistic hymns.

Align targeting cogitators whilst invoking the Omnissiah's wrathful precision.
Commence firing rite, ensuring the cognis heavy stubber's unerring Machine Spirit endures.

Approach the codifier reverently, murmuring the Invocation of Cyclic Harmony.
Prepare the codifier for cycling by sanctifying its data spindles with electro-consecrated myrrh.
Initiate the cycling sequence, beseeching the Machine Spirit to weave flawless logic loops.
Monitor flux rhythms whilst chanting stabilizing binaric sutras over the codifier.
Conclude the cycle with Omnissiah's benediction, affirming perpetual readiness.

Sever power linkages, invoking the Omnissiah to bind its venomous ire.
Seal the needle rifle in warded repose, its Machine Spirit subdued in shutdown vigil.

prayer:

Bless the Leman Russ battle tank for purification with ablutionary plasma rites.
Circumambulate its hull, chanting expurgation psalms to rouse the Machine Spirit.
Anoint battle cannon and sponson mounts, beseeching Omnissiah's cleansing fire.
Affirm the Leman Russ battle tank's purity through auspex hymns of structural sanctity.

user_prompt: Consecrate the memory core before consecration
prayer:
Enshrine the memory core within noospheric wards prior to consecration.
Consecrate the memory core by intoning the Lexicon of Eternal Recall upon its vaults.
Infuse binaric catechisms, awakening the memory core's Machine Spirit to divine obedience.
Anoint neural engrams with sanctified nano-slurries whilst invoking the Omnissiah.
Seal the consecration with verification canticles, ensuring immutable fidelity.

prayer:
